ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "total_active_contracts" INTEGER /* Total number of active contracts managed by the agency */,
  "total_value_active_contracts" REAL /* Total monetary value of all active contracts */,
  "address" TEXT /* Agency's physical address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the agency is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the agency is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the agency's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the agency is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Agency's phone number */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Agency's fax number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Agency's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency managing the contract */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete associated with the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total monetary value of the contract */,
  "current_aav" REAL /* Current annual average value of the contract */,
  "largest_aav" REAL /* Largest annual average value of the contract */,
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of contract (e.g., Rookie, Extension) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract ends */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus amount for the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Current team of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birthdate of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the athlete was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the athlete was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the athlete was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for contract detail */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated contract */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the contract in years */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus amount for the contract */,
  "incentives" REAL /* Performance incentives associated with the contract */,
  "escalators" REAL /* Contract escalators */,
  "no_movement_clauses" INTEGER /* No movement clause */,
  "no_trade_clauses" INTEGER /* No trade clause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_details_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated contract */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Amendment, Renewal) */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value associated with the change */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Previous value before the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_history_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type (e.g., Rookie Contract, Extension) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player profile */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated athlete */,
  "university" TEXT /* University attended by the athlete, if applicable */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the athlete was drafted into the league */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the athlete */,
  "junior_team" TEXT /* Junior team the athlete played for */,
  "junior_league" TEXT /* Junior league the athlete played in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_profiles" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency they work for */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Agent's phone number */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Agent's fax number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_profiles_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the metrics apply */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the athlete */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the athlete */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the athlete */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the athlete */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the athlete */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes incurred by the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endorsements" (
  "endorsement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endorsement */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete receiving the endorsement */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand associated with the endorsement */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Contract value of the endorsement deal */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the endorsement in years */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the endorsement was activated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endorsement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endorsements_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete involved in the sponsorship */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsoring company */,
  "sponsorship_value" REAL /* Value of the sponsorship deal */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the sponsorship in years */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sponsorship was activated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated athlete */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Athlete's handle on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated athlete */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated athlete */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
